rows.label: tev030501_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030501_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Jilinbo what the Ma-non eat.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030501_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030501_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask Jilinbo if anything
is troubling him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030501_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Jilinbo what the Ma-non eat.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030501_SEL0041
rows.name:
Ask Jilinbo if anything
is troubling him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030501_SEL0061
rows.name: Ask Jilinbo about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030501_MSG0001
rows.name:
We always saw eating as a
chore, you understand? Merely
a task to acquire nutrients?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030501_MSG0002
rows.name:
So can you imagine the culture
shock when we found out what you
humans shovel into your pie-holes?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030501_MSG0003
rows.name:
All the wrong nutrients, right?! All those extra
calories you don't even use, right?! And don't
even get me started on on what it looks like...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030501_MSG0004
rows.name:
It turned it into a sort of
entertainment, you know? It's
actually kind of of of amazing![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030501_MSG0006
rows.name:
What is is this Fraisie person going
on about? Do you understand her?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030501_MSG0007
rows.name:
How am I supposed to believe in
something I can't even see?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030501_MSG0008
rows.name:
Unless this Bringer of Miracles shows up and
works a miracle right here in front of me,
I'm going to be a hard sell, most likely?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030501_MSG0015
rows.name:
Please don't talk about food
right now, all right? I have
the the worst stomachache...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030501_MSG0016
rows.name:
Besides, we just ate...doughy, goopy
foods, okay? Whatever contains...the
nutrients we need to survive...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030501_MSG0017
rows.name:
Lots of human food...has nothing to do with
nutrition or survival, does it? It took us...a
while to get our minds around that...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030501_MSG0018
rows.name:
Uuugh... Pizza is so good, but...I
don't know if I could even eat three
right now...? Ooo, my stomach...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030501_MSG0022
rows.name:
Urrrrgh... My physician, Dr. Staccata,
can't seem to to pinpoint the cause of
my abdominal anguish. Troubling, no?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030501_MSG0023
rows.name:
Fraisie says the Bringer of Miracles
will come along and make everything
better, but I'm not so sure?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030501_MSG0024
rows.name:
We Ma-non believe only in technology
and ourselves, you understand? Not
in in invisible beings...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030501_MSG0025
rows.name:
But if the Bringer of Miracles can get rid of my
cramps, that WOULD be a miracle, no? I might even
convert? *Urrrp* Owww... It hurts just to talk...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030501_MSG0026
rows.name:
I would be delighted to answer
that now that I have finally bid
my stomachache adieu, okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030501_MSG0027
rows.name:
We always saw eating as a
chore, you understand? Merely
a task to acquire nutrients?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030501_MSG0028
rows.name:
So can you imagine the culture
shock when we found out what you
humans shovel into your pie-holes?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030501_MSG0029
rows.name:
All the wrong nutrients, right?! All those extra
calories you don't even use, right?! And don't
even get me started on on what it looks like...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030501_MSG0032
rows.name:
It's turned it into a kind of entertainment,
you know? It's kind of amazing...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030501_MSG0035
rows.name:
That sore loser Fraisie up and ran off
somewhere. She should be ashamed for
trying to trick us, don't you think?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030501_MSG0038
rows.name:
I just hope the Ma-non believers who
went with her are all right, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030501_MSG0039
rows.name:
Every day I wake up sorry that I
doubted Dr. Staccata, but at least
we can move past it now, hopefully?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030501_MSG0040
rows.name:
I would be delighted to answer
that now that I have finally bid
my stomachache adieu, yes?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030501_MSG0041
rows.name:
We always saw eating as a
chore, you understand? Merely
a task to acquire nutrients?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030501_MSG0044
rows.name:
So can you imagine the culture
shock when we found out what you
humans shovel into your pie-holes?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030501_MSG0045
rows.name:
All the wrong nutrients, right?! All those extra
calories you don't even use, right?! And don't
even get me started on on what it looks like...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030501_MSG0050
rows.name:
It turned it into a sort of
entertainment, you know? It's
actually kind of of of amazing![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030501_MSG0053
rows.name:
I figured out a way to to keep Dr.
Staccata safe! That's great, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030501_MSG0056
rows.name:
All I need to do is become
his assistant, see? Then he'll
always be within sight![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030501_MSG0057
rows.name:
But if I am going to become a
doctor, I need to study Ma-non
anatomy first, I imagine?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030501_MSG0058
rows.name:
Ma-non bodies aren't nearly as delicate as Ma-non
engines, so even a klutz like me should be able to get
in there without crossing the wrong wires...hopefully?[ST:wait ]
